title: The FULL Create Experience
description: I combined the best create mods into one pack for all create fans to enoy!
body:
**FORGE IS NOW DISCONTINUED BECAUSE I SPENT HOURS TRYING TO FIX IT AND IT DID NOT WORK...**


This is the Create Experience modpack, I made this modpack so people could experience real create, create to its limits, also just to have fun and mess around with. This is really good for create players! I will update this every once in a while. The mod includes lots of mods, I'll list some of them here:

Create

Create: New age

Create: Crafts and Additions

Create: Bells and Whistles

Create: Misc and Things

And much more!

Hope you enjoy!
